name: Mana Surge
treat: Channels raw mana into a devastating forward blast that damages all units in its path.

name: Arcane Shield
treat: Summons a crystalline barrier that absorbs damage for friendly units behind it.

name: Void Rift
treat: Tears a hole in reality, pulling all nearby enemies toward the epicentre before detonating.

name: Stagnantia's Wrath
treat: The full weight of a bored civilisation, channelled into one catastrophic strike.
